title: Maximize your staking
introduction: You have {{available}} ICP available that isn't earning rewards. Staking 100% of your ICP maximizes your governance rewards.
introductionMaturityOnly: You have {{available}} unstaked maturity that isn't compounding. Enable auto-stake on your neurons to maximize your rewards.

whyStake.title: Why stake everything?
whyStake.rewards: Unstaked ICP earns 0%, while staked ICP earns up to {{maxApy}}% APY.
whyStake.votingPower: More stake equals more influence in governance decisions.
whyStake.flexibility: You can dissolve Stakes anytime (withdrawable after the locking period).

whyStakeMaturity.title: Why enable auto-stake maturity?
whyStakeMaturity.rewards: Unstaked maturity earns 0%, while staked maturity compounds and earns up to {{maxApy}}% APY.
whyStakeMaturity.votingPower: Staked maturity increases your neuron's voting power.
whyStakeMaturity.compounding: Auto-staked maturity compounds automatically, boosting long-term rewards.

recommendation: Stake your available {{available}} ICP with an 8-year delay to maximize your rewards.
recommendationMaturityOnly: Enable auto-stake maturity on your neurons to compound your {{available}} unstaked maturity.
